enExample: My teacher is an American.
zhExample: 我的老師是一位美國人。

enExample: Dr. Lee helps patients feel better.
zhExample: 李醫生幫助病人感覺好一點。

enExample: We hunt for eggs on Easter.
zhExample: 復活節我們去尋蛋。

enExample: We give gifts on Father's Day.
zhExample: 我們在父親節送禮物。

enExample: We wear costumes and go trick-or-treating on Halloween.
zhExample: 萬聖節時我們穿上服裝去要糖果。

enExample: I research information on the Internet for my report.
zhExample: 我在網際網路上查資料做報告。

enExample: We eat mooncakes on Moon Festival.
zhExample: 中秋節我們吃月餅。

enExample: We give flowers on Mother's Day.
zhExample: 我們在母親節送花。

enExample: Ms. Chen is our new English teacher.
zhExample: 陳小姐是我們的新英語老師。

enExample: The flag of the R.O.C. flies on the building.
zhExample: 中華民國的國旗飄揚在那棟建築上。

enExample: We give cards on Teacher's Day.
zhExample: 我們在教師節送卡片。

enExample: He hopes to study in the USA.
zhExample: 他希望到美國念書。

enExample: She studies abroad next year.
zhExample: 她明年到國外念書。

enExample: The actress performed on stage.
zhExample: 那位女演員在舞臺上表演。

enExample: "Although it was raining
zhExample: they still played soccer."

enExample: They play badminton after school.
zhExample: 他們放學後打羽球。

enExample: My mom will bake a cake for my birthday.
zhExample: 我媽媽會為我的生日烘焙蛋糕。

enExample: The bakery near my house sells fresh bread.
zhExample: 我家附近的麵包店賣新鮮麵包。

enExample: The band plays music at the concert.
zhExample: 那個樂團在音樂會上演奏。

enExample: They barbecue chicken in the backyard on weekends.
zhExample: 他們週末在後院烤雞。

enExample: The scouts set up base near the lake.
zhExample: 童子軍在湖邊建立了基地。

enExample: I take a bath every night.
zhExample: 我每天晚上洗澡。

enExample: That book belongs to me.
zhExample: 那本書屬於我。

enExample: Sit beside me on the bench.
zhExample: 坐在長椅的我的旁邊。

enExample: "Be careful
zhExample: the dog might bite."

enExample: The blind student reads with a special device.
zhExample: 那位盲人學生用特殊設備閱讀。

enExample: Blow on the hot soup before you eat it.
zhExample: 在吃燙湯前先吹一下。

enExample: He was born in 2008.
zhExample: 他出生於2008年。

enExample: May I borrow your eraser?
zhExample: 我可以借你的橡皮擦嗎？

enExample: Her boss praised her work.
zhExample: 她的老闆讚揚了她的工作。

enExample: The actor will bow to the audience.
zhExample: 演員會向觀眾鞠躬。

enExample: I found a bug crawling on the window.
zhExample: 我發現一隻蟲子在窗戶上爬行。

enExample: Be careful not to burn your hand on the stove.
zhExample: 小心別把手燙傷在爐子上。

enExample: The businessman traveled abroad for a meeting.
zhExample: 那位商人出國開會。

enExample: The bird sings in its cage every morning.
zhExample: 那隻鳥每天早上在籠子裡唱歌。

enExample: We celebrate Teacher's Day with a small party.
zhExample: 我們用小型派對慶祝教師節。

enExample: The candy costs fifty cents.
zhExample: 這顆糖果要價五十分錢。

enExample: The book is twenty centimeters long.
zhExample: 這本書長二十公分。

enExample: Write on the board with chalk.
zhExample: 用粉筆在黑板上寫字。

enExample: Don't cheat on the exam; be honest.
zhExample: 考試時不要作弊，要誠實。

enExample: The crowd will cheer for the winning team.
zhExample: 人群會為獲勝的隊伍歡呼。

enExample: They play chess after class.
zhExample: 他們課後下西洋棋。

enExample: We go to church on Sunday morning.
zhExample: 我們星期天早上去教堂。

enExample: The class leader hands out the worksheets.
zhExample: 班長發放工作紙。

enExample: He likes to collect stamps from different countries.
zhExample: 他喜歡收集來自不同國家的郵票。

enExample: This chair is very comfortable to sit on.
zhExample: 這張椅子坐起來非常舒適。

enExample: Living near the station is very convenient.
zhExample: 住在車站附近非常便利。

enExample: He will deal with the problem after class.
zhExample: 他會在下課後處理這個問題。

enExample: Ring the doorbell when you arrive at her house.
zhExample: 到她家時請按門鈴。

enExample: Put the letter inside the envelope.
zhExample: 把信放進信封裡。

enExample: Excuse me for being late to class.
zhExample: 對不起，我上課遲到了。

enExample: He learned how to fix his bike after it broke.
zhExample: 自行車壞了之後，他學會了如何修理。

enExample: In the fairy tale
zhExample: a giant guards the castle.

enExample: Use glue to stick the pieces together.
zhExample: 用膠水把零件黏在一起。

enExample: One hundred grams of sugar is in the recipe.
zhExample: 食譜中需要一百公克的糖。

enExample: Guava is green on the outside.
zhExample: 芭樂外皮是綠色的。

enExample: We wear costumes and go trick-or-treating on Halloween.
zhExample: 萬聖節時我們穿上服裝去要糖果。

enExample: I have a headache after studying all afternoon.
zhExample: 下午一直念書之後我頭痛。

enExample: The hen laid five eggs this morning.
zhExample: 這隻母雞今天早上下了五顆蛋。

enExample: My grandfather used to hunt in the forest.
zhExample: 我爺爺以前在森林裡打獵。

enExample: Measure the length of the book in inches.
zhExample: 用英吋測量這本書的長度。

enExample: She is interested in learning English.
zhExample: 她對學英語感興趣。

enExample: She has an interview for a summer job tomorrow.
zhExample: 她明天有一個暑期工作的面試。

enExample: The cat cleaned itself.
zhExample: 那隻貓自己清潔。

enExample: This bag of rice weighs one kilogram.
zhExample: 這袋米重一公斤。

enExample: Children carry lanterns during the mid‐autumn festival.
zhExample: 中秋節時孩子們提著燈籠。

enExample: The leader guided the group up the mountain.
zhExample: 領導者帶領小組爬上山。

enExample: Put the lid on the jar after you finish.
zhExample: 用完後把蓋子蓋上罐子。

enExample: She felt lonely after moving to a new city.
zhExample: 搬到新城市後，她感到很孤獨。

enExample: He performed a magic trick with cards.
zhExample: 他用牌表演了一個魔術。

enExample: He wore a mask at the school play.
zhExample: 他在校劇中戴著面具。

enExample: Wipe your feet on the mat before entering the house.
zhExample: 進屋前請先在踏墊上擦腳。

enExample: It does not matter if you are late once.
zhExample: 偶爾遲到一次並不重要。

enExample: He likes his coffee at medium temperature.
zhExample: 他喜歡中等溫度的咖啡。

enExample: They ran five miles in the marathon.
zhExample: 他們在馬拉松中跑了五英里。

enExample: They live in a modern house with big windows.
zhExample: 他們住在一棟有大窗戶的現代房子裡。

enExample: They fly the national flag at the town square.
zhExample: 他們在鎮廣場上升起國旗。

enExample: My neighbor waters my plants when I'm away.
zhExample: 我不在時，我的鄰居會幫我澆花。

enExample: She gave me a nod to say hello.
zhExample: 她向我點頭打招呼。

enExample: The delivery man dropped off a package at our door.
zhExample: 送貨員把一個包裹放在我們家門口。

enExample: I need to pack my clothes for the weekend trip.
zhExample: 我需要為週末旅行把衣服打包。

enExample: Papaya is sweet and delicious.
zhExample: 木瓜又甜又美味。

enExample: Paste the picture into your notebook.
zhExample: 把圖片黏貼到你的筆記本上。

enExample: Perhaps we can go to the zoo this weekend.
zhExample: 或許我們這個週末可以去動物園。

enExample: Use a pin to attach the note to the board.
zhExample: 用大頭針把便條釘在板子上。

enExample: The plumber fixed the broken pipe under the sink.
zhExample: 水電工修好了水槽下壞掉的水管。

enExample: Earth is our home planet.
zhExample: 地球是我們的家園星球。

enExample: We meet our friends at the playground after school.
zhExample: 放學後我們在遊樂場與朋友碰面。

enExample: Be polite to your teachers.
zhExample: 對老師要有禮貌。

enExample: We eat popcorn at the movie theater.
zhExample: 我們在電影院吃爆米花。

enExample: Good preparation helped him do well in the contest.
zhExample: 良好的準備幫助他在比賽中表現優異。

enExample: She won a prize for her drawing in the contest.
zhExample: 她在比賽中因畫作獲得獎品。

enExample: This is a public park.
zhExample: 這是一個公共公園。

enExample: The puppy plays with a ball in the yard.
zhExample: 幼犬在院子裡玩球。

enExample: Where is the restroom in this building?
zhExample: 這棟建築物的廁所在哪裡？

enExample: The sun will rise at six o'clock tomorrow morning.
zhExample: 明天早上六點太陽會升起。

enExample: Please sit in a row during assembly.
zhExample: 請在集合時排成一列。

enExample: Add a pinch of salt to the soup.
zhExample: 在湯裡加一小撮鹽。

enExample: He was scared when he saw the big dog.
zhExample: 看到那隻大狗時他感到很害怕。

enExample: The teacher shows the video on the screen.
zhExample: 老師在螢幕上播放影片。

enExample: The secretary answers phone calls at the office.
zhExample: 秘書在辦公室接電話。

enExample: She plants a seed in the pot.
zhExample: 她在花盆裡種下一粒種子。

enExample: He will start senior high school next year.
zhExample: 他明年將開始讀高中。

enExample: He looks serious during the exam.
zhExample: 他在考試時表情很嚴肅。

enExample: Be careful with that knife; it is very sharp.
zhExample: 要小心那把刀，它非常鋒利。

enExample: She is too shy to speak in front of the class.
zhExample: 她太害羞，無法在全班面前講話。

enExample: Walk on the sidewalk
zhExample: not in the street.

enExample: Please slide the door open slowly.
zhExample: 請慢慢地把門滑開。

enExample: I left my book somewhere in the classroom.
zhExample: 我把書放在教室的某處。

enExample: That was a stupid mistake.
zhExample: 那是一個愚笨的錯誤。

enExample: She felt successful after finishing the race.
zhExample: 她跑完比賽後感到很成功。

enExample: She was surprised by the unexpected gift.
zhExample: 她對那份意外的禮物感到驚訝。

enExample: We play the tape in music class.
zhExample: 我們在音樂課播放錄音帶。

enExample: They painted the fence themselves.
zhExample: 他們自己粉刷了圍欄。

enExample: Please tidy your desk before you leave.
zhExample: 離開前請整理好你的書桌。

enExample: Please tie your shoe laces before you run.
zhExample: 跑步前請先把鞋帶繫好。

enExample: He uses a tool to fix the bike.
zhExample: 他用工具修理自行車。

enExample: The total cost is fifty dollars.
zhExample: 總計花費是五十元。

enExample: She will treat her friends to ice cream after school.
zhExample: 她放學後要請朋友們吃冰淇淋。

enExample: The typhoon will reach us tomorrow.
zhExample: 颱風明天會到達我們這裡。

enExample: He was unhappy because he missed the bus.
zhExample: 因為他錯過了公車，他感到不快樂。

enExample: Students must wear their uniform to school every day.
zhExample: 學生每天都必須穿制服上學。

enExample: This dictionary is very useful for learning new words.
zhExample: 這本字典對學習新單字非常實用。

enExample: The teacher shows a video about history.
zhExample: 老師播放一段關於歷史的錄影帶。

enExample: We eat watermelon in summer.
zhExample: 夏天我們吃西瓜。

enExample: The surfers rode the big wave at sunrise.
zhExample: 衝浪者在日出時騎著大浪。

enExample: Whose backpack is this on the desk?
zhExample: 桌上的書包是誰的？

enExample: Be proud of yourselves!
zhExample: 為你們自己感到驕傲！

enExample: Take care of yourself when you travel.
zhExample: 旅行時要照顧好你自己。

enExample: My teacher is an American.
zhExample: 我的老師是一位美國人。

enExample: Dr. Lee helps patients feel better.

enExample: She won a prize for her drawing in the contest.
zhExample: 她在比賽中因畫作獲得獎品。

enExample: This is a public park.
zhExample: 這是一個公共公園。

enExample: The puppy plays with a ball in the yard.
zhExample: 幼犬在院子裡玩球。

enExample: Where is the restroom in this building?
zhExample: 這棟建築物的廁所在哪裡？

enExample: The sun will rise at six o'clock tomorrow morning.
zhExample: 明天早上六點太陽會升起。

enExample: Please sit in a row during assembly.
zhExample: 請在集合時排成一列。

enExample: Add a pinch of salt to the soup.
zhExample: 在湯裡加一小撮鹽。

enExample: He was scared when he saw the big dog.
zhExample: 看到那隻大狗時他感到很害怕。

enExample: The teacher shows the video on the screen.
zhExample: 老師在螢幕上播放影片。

enExample: The secretary answers phone calls at the office.
zhExample: 秘書在辦公室接電話。

enExample: She plants a seed in the pot.
zhExample: 她在花盆裡種下一粒種子。

enExample: He will start senior high school next year.
zhExample: 他明年將開始讀高中。

enExample: He looks serious during the exam.
zhExample: 他在考試時表情很嚴肅。

enExample: Be careful with that knife; it is very sharp.
zhExample: 要小心那把刀，它非常鋒利。

enExample: She is too shy to speak in front of the class.
zhExample: 她太害羞，無法在全班面前講話。

enExample: Walk on the sidewalk
zhExample: not in the street.

enExample: Please slide the door open slowly.
zhExample: 請慢慢地把門滑開。

enExample: I left my book somewhere in the classroom.
zhExample: 我把書放在教室的某處。

enExample: That was a stupid mistake.
zhExample: 那是一個愚笨的錯誤。

enExample: She felt successful after finishing the race.
zhExample: 她跑完比賽後感到很成功。

enExample: She was surprised by the unexpected gift.
zhExample: 她對那份意外的禮物感到驚訝。

enExample: We play the tape in music class.
zhExample: 我們在音樂課播放錄音帶。

enExample: They painted the fence themselves.
zhExample: 他們自己粉刷了圍欄。

enExample: Please tidy your desk before you leave.
zhExample: 離開前請整理好你的書桌。

enExample: Please tie your shoe laces before you run.
zhExample: 跑步前請先把鞋帶繫好。

enExample: He uses a tool to fix the bike.
zhExample: 他用工具修理自行車。

enExample: The total cost is fifty dollars.
zhExample: 總計花費是五十元。

enExample: She will treat her friends to ice cream after school.
zhExample: 她放學後要請朋友們吃冰淇淋。

enExample: The typhoon will reach us tomorrow.
zhExample: 颱風明天會到達我們這裡。

enExample: He was unhappy because he missed the bus.
zhExample: 因為他錯過了公車，他感到不快樂。

enExample: Students must wear their uniform to school every day.
zhExample: 學生每天都必須穿制服上學。

enExample: This dictionary is very useful for learning new words.
zhExample: 這本字典對學習新單字非常實用。

enExample: The teacher shows a video about history.
zhExample: 老師播放一段關於歷史的錄影帶。

enExample: We eat watermelon in summer.
zhExample: 夏天我們吃西瓜。

enExample: The surfers rode the big wave at sunrise.
zhExample: 衝浪者在日出時騎著大浪。

enExample: Whose backpack is this on the desk?
zhExample: 桌上的書包是誰的？

enExample: Be proud of yourselves!
zhExample: 為你們自己感到驕傲！

enExample: I see a bird.
zhExample: 我看到一隻鳥。

enExample: She is a teacher.
zhExample: 她是老師。

enExample: They are students.
zhExample: 他們是學生。

enExample: He does his homework.
zhExample: 他做他的功課。

enExample: I like grapes.
zhExample: 我喜歡葡萄。

enExample: She has big eyes.
zhExample: 她有大眼睛。

enExample: Rabbits have long ears.
zhExample: 兔子有長耳朵。

enExample: Brush your teeth.
zhExample: 刷牙。

enExample: Her lips are red.
zhExample: 她的嘴唇是紅色的。

enExample: We like pizza.
zhExample: 我們喜歡披薩。

enExample: My grandmother makes yummy cookies.
zhExample: 我的祖母會做美味的餅乾。

enExample: She has two cats at home.
zhExample: 她家裡有兩隻貓。

enExample: Four chairs are around the table.
zhExample: 桌子旁有四張椅子。

enExample: I walk to school with my friends.
zhExample: 我跟朋友一起走路上學。

enExample: I use a ruler to draw lines.
zhExample: 我用尺畫線。

enExample: Can I borrow your eraser?
zhExample: 我可以借一下你的橡皮擦嗎？

enExample: The marker is red and thick.
zhExample: 這支麥克筆又紅又粗。

enExample: My pencil box has many colors.
zhExample: 我的鉛筆盒裡有很多顏色的文具。

enExample: The bear in the zoo is big.
zhExample: 動物園裡的熊很大隻。

enExample: The bear in the zoo is big.
zhExample: 動物園裡的熊很大隻。

enExample: The fox ran into the forest.
zhExample: 狐狸跑進森林裡了。

enExample: The frog jumps into the water.
zhExample: 青蛙跳進水裡了。

enExample: An ant is carrying food.
zhExample: 一隻螞蟻正在搬食物。

enExample: A bee is flying near the flower.
zhExample: 一隻蜜蜂在花旁飛舞。

enExample: He wants to be a singer.
zhExample: 他想當一位歌手。

enExample: The chef cooked a tasty meal.
zhExample: 那位廚師煮了一頓好吃的飯。

enExample: Her dad is an engineer.
zhExample: 她爸爸是工程師。

enExample: The worker fixed the road.
zhExample: 工人修好了馬路。

enExample: Mr. Chen is our math teacher.
zhExample: 陳老師是我們的數學老師。

enExample: Mrs. Wang is very kind.
zhExample: 王太太人很好。

enExample: I ate a sweet pear today.
zhExample: 我今天吃了一顆甜甜的梨子。

enExample: This peach is soft and juicy.
zhExample: 這顆桃子又軟又多汁。

enExample: Drink more water when it's hot.
zhExample: 天氣熱的時候要多喝水。

enExample: He opened a can of cola.
zhExample: 他打開了一罐可樂。
